hero.introducing: Introducing: Your all-in-one AI meeting assistant
waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlist.description: Don't hesitate, join the waitlist now and be the first to experience our product!
waitlist.toast.error: Failed to join, please try again.
waitlist.toast.success: Successfully joined! You will receive a confirmation email soon.
waitlist.toast.duplicate_email: This email is already on the waitlist.
painpoint.title: Do you have these troubles?
painpoint.quote: "We are present, but our minds are not focused."
painpoint.description: From online meetings, remote courses, business presentations, to cross-departmental communication, we are used to switching between meeting windows, Google, ChatGPT, and cloud drives. We look up information, take notes, and respond to messages, trying to multitask, but we are not really making progress.
painpoint.item1.title: Frequent window switching
painpoint.item2.title: Can't keep up with the pace
painpoint.item2.description: Unable to grasp the context in real time
painpoint.item3.title: Poor preparation
painpoint.item3.description: Unable to respond effectively in a timely manner
solution.title: INTEVIA: Your Smart Partner
solution.description: INTEVIA understands your current work content and needs, so you no longer need to switch windows to find information. At every moment you use your computer, it provides real-time transcription, summarizes the current situation, and suggests responses. Let you turn on the 'Knowledge Buff', greatly reducing the operational burden and focusing on the most core output.
solution.stage1.title: Before the meeting
solution.stage1.item1: Set meeting goals, topics, and members
solution.stage1.item2: Upload relevant documents (such as agendas and resumes)
solution.stage2.title: During the meeting
solution.stage3.title: After the meeting
integrations.title: Works with your favorite meeting software
integrations.description: INTEVIA AI runs in the background and seamlessly integrates with popular platforms like Google Meet, Zoom, Microsoft Teams, and Webex.
team.description: We are three students from National Taiwan University who have participated in some entrepreneurial projects. This time, we gathered together because of the 'NTU Nest' (the first entrepreneur and VC club in NTU). We started with voice and wanted to do real-time 'accent conversion and optimization AI'. After some research, we found that there are many such products on the market, and the technology is very mature. It is even just an 'affiliated function' of some conference AI. Therefore, for students, it is not a good starting point to enter the market now and start from scratch to develop difficult voice technology. Therefore, we are moving towards the direction of conference and interview AI assistance.
team.progress.item2: Collecting the first wave of user feedback and improving the product
team.progress.item3: Developing customers, participating in entrepreneurship competitions and seeking funding
team.progress.item4: Applying for a new type of application patent
demo.title: Try our web demo!
demo.start_prompt: Click "Start Recording" to activate the AI assistant and start recording.
demo.custom_prompt_placeholder: Enter a custom prompt or question...
demo.session_timeout_notice: The test experience will automatically stop after 5 minutes
demo.instructions.title: Instructions
demo.instructions.description: This version provides basic core functions to help you get a preliminary feel for our real-time voice analysis and interaction capabilities.
demo.instructions.recommendations.title: Usage Recommendations
demo.instructions.recommendations.item1: Please use a computer for operation
demo.instructions.recommendations.item1_: , to ensure stable functionality and a complete experience.
demo.instructions.recommendations.item2: It is recommended to use the Chrome browser
demo.instructions.recommendations.item2_: , and confirm that microphone and camera permissions are enabled.
demo.instructions.steps.title: Operating Steps
demo.instructions.steps.item1_descriptio: The system will ask you to select a screen source and allow the use of the microphone and camera.
demo.instructions.steps.item2_descriptio: Start talking to the camera, or play any voice/video content.
demo.instructions.steps.item3_descriptio: Observe the real-time transcript, click on keywords, or use the AI action buttons on the right.
demo.instructions.features.title: Feature Introduction
demo.instructions.features.intro: When you start talking, INTEVIA AI will:
demo.instructions.features.item2_part3: below, which can be clicked to search.
demo.instructions.features.item3_intro: Provide 3 interactive toolbar functions that can be clicked to use:
demo.instructions.features.item3_action1: : Automatically generate responses based on the content.
demo.instructions.features.item3_action2: : Summarize the key points of the recent passage.
demo.instructions.features.item3_action3: : Extend the search for related information.
demo.instructions.features.outro: You can also enter any prompt in the input box to ask questions or give commands freely.
demo.instructions.scenarios.title: Usage Scenarios
demo.instructions.scenarios.intro: The following are recommended usage scenarios, you can also use them freely:
demo.instructions.scenarios.item1_title: Play a video in the background + talk to yourself
demo.instructions.scenarios.item1_desc: Play a video with sound (such as a speech, course, or Podcast), ask questions while watching the transcript change, and try using the three functions.
demo.instructions.scenarios.item2_desc: Chat with friends or talk to yourself, share recent events or discuss news, observe how INTEVIA AI processes content in real time, and test the function buttons.
demo.ai_error: [AI Error] Failed to process your request. Please check your network connection or try again later. Poor audio quality may also cause processing to fail.
demo.keyword_explanation_error: [Error] Failed to get an explanation for {keyword}. Please check your network connection or try again later.
demo.system_audio_error: Could not capture system audio, recording will only include microphone. To record system audio, please make sure to check the share audio option when sharing your screen.
demo.prompt.answer: Based on the dialogue in the recent audio, answer the last question asked in the audio. As there will be two types of audio, one from the microphone and one from the system, please answer the question from the microphone audio first, then the system audio. If necessary, please search online.
demo.prompt.summary: Provide a concise summary of the dialogue captured in the recent audio clip. Please answer in the language of the audio. If there is no dialogue to summarize in the microphone audio, you do not need to answer for that audio.
demo.prompt.search: Based on the topics discussed in the recent audio clip, suggest relevant search keywords or find related information. Please answer in the language of the audio. If there is no dialogue to search in the microphone audio, you do not need to answer for that audio.
demo.prompt.custom: Analyze the dialogue captured in the recent audio clip based on the following requirements. Please answer in the language of the audio.
demo.display_prompt.answer: Answer questions based on voice content
demo.display_prompt.summary: Generate a summary based on past voice content
demo.display_prompt.search: Search for topics based on voice content
demo.keyword_explanation.prompt: Please explain this technical term in a simple and easy-to-understand way: {keyword}
cta.title: Subscribe for future updates!
cta.description: If you are interested in our products, please fill in your email address and we will notify you when a new version is released!
cta.placeholder: Enter your email to get updates
proxy.system_prompt:
You are a real-time transcription assistant. For each audio input, respond in the following format:

TRANSCRIPTION: [transcribe the audio content here]
KEYWORDS: [list any technical terms, specialized vocabulary, or complex concepts that might be difficult for a general audience to understand, separated by commas. If none, leave empty]

Example:
TRANSCRIPTION: The quantum entanglement phenomenon demonstrates non-local correlations between particles.
KEYWORDS: quantum entanglement, non-local correlations

If there are no difficult terms, respond with empty keywords:
TRANSCRIPTION: The weather is nice today.
KEYWORDS:
